application_process: Book an appointment via the VFS Global Portugal visa portal (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/prt/)
Complete the Schengen visa application form (available on the VFS portal)
Prepare all required documents per the checklist below
Pay the visa fee and VFS Global service charge online or at the centre
Attend your appointment at the VFS Global Portugal Visa Application Centre with original documents
Track your application status online via the VFS Global portal
Passport returned by courier to your registered address or collect from the centre
documents_required: Valid Indian passport (minimum 3 months validity beyond return date, at least 2 blank pages)
Completed and signed Schengen visa application form
Two recent passport-size photographs (35x45mm, white background, taken within last 6 months)
Accommodation proof (hotel reservations for all nights or invitation letter)
Travel insurance minimum €30,000 coverage, valid for all Schengen states
Bank statements (last 6 months, minimum average balance ₹4,00,000 recommended)
Proof of financial means (minimum €100/day or equivalent in INR)
If employed: NOC letter from employer + last 3 months salary slips + ITR
If self-employed: Business registration + latest ITR + CA-certified financial statement
Proof of ties to India (property documents, family, return job — shows intent to return)
processing_timeline: 15 working days; apply at least 6 weeks before travel. June–September (summer) may take up to 20 working days. Do NOT book non-refundable travel until visa is approved.
fees: Schengen visa fee: €90 (~₹8,100) + VFS Global service charge: ₹2,080 + optional courier: ₹750
dos_and_donts: DO apply at the earliest opportunity — Schengen processing is not expedited for Indians even for emergencies
DO book flexible/refundable flights and hotels until the visa is in hand
DO ensure your bank statement is genuine and shows regular activity, not a sudden large deposit
DO get travel insurance from a reputable provider — it is mandatory and checked
DON'T submit incorrect or conflicting information on the form — a single inconsistency causes rejection
DON'T travel to other Schengen countries more than your Portugal visa duration allows
DON'T overstay — even by one day — as it affects all future Schengen visa applications

nearest_embassy.name: Embassy of Portugal in New Delhi
nearest_embassy.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 09:00-13:00 (consular section; visas via VFS only)

application_centre.name: VFS Global — Portugal Visa Application Centre, Mumbai
application_centre.address: VFS Global Services Pvt Ltd, 1st Floor, Times Square Building, Andheri Kurla Road, Andheri East, Mumbai 400059

validity_notes: Schengen short-stay visa: up to 90 days within any 180-day period. Single, double, or multiple entry available depending on travel history and frequency. Multiple-entry visas are granted only to repeat travellers with a good Schengen visa history.

sources.title: Portuguese Consulate General — Visa Information for Indian Nationals
VFS Global — Portugal Schengen Visa India
EU Schengen Visa — Official European Union Information

disclaimer: Visa rules change frequently and depend on your exact nationality and circumstances. This is guidance only — always confirm with the official consulate or embassy before booking travel.
